author: TLk9
content: Discord integration (#46) complete. 15 files updated to reference https://discord.gg/kfM6Q4UBbM and specific channels. No commit created — leaving that for the user to run /commit when they're ready. The Guild chapter (00-foundations/06-the-guild.md) got the biggest rewrite; other files mostly replaced 'guild channel' with links to specific Discord channels matched to topic. User's #adverserial-review spelling (with 'e') preserved exactly.
